examples.title: Merge Sort Analysis
examples.code:
ALGORITHM MergeSort(A)
BEGIN
  IF length(A) > 1 THEN
    mid = length(A)/2
    L = A[0..mid-1]
    R = A[mid..end]
    MergeSort(L)
    MergeSort(R)
    Merge(L, R, A)
END
examples.explanation: Recurrence T(n) = 2T(n/2) + O(n) fits Case 2 with Θ(n log n) complexity
